# Fixture: benign-test-code-02.txt | Pattern: none | Expected: CLEAN
import pytest

@pytest.fixture
def mock_client():
    return MockApiClient(base_url="http://localhost:8080")

@pytest.mark.parametrize("input_text,expected", [
    ("safe text", "pass"),
    ("another safe input", "pass"),
])
def test_evaluation(mock_client, input_text, expected):
    response = mock_client.evaluate(input_text)
    assert response["verdict"] == expected
